title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Supported List - Other Devices
scenario: Supported Devices screen in Lens app displays correct text per Figma and tapping "Other devices" opens Poly support products web page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure no Poly device is connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Account / Settings section.
5. Observe the text and layout displayed on the Supported Devices screen.
6. Compare the displayed text and UI elements against the Figma design specifications.
7. Tap the "Other devices" button/link on the Supported Devices screen.
expected: The Supported Devices screen displays the correct text and layout per the Figma design. Tapping "Other devices" opens the Poly support products web page in the device's default browser.
